expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs get command (not search) to fetch the specific issue
expectations.evidence: Step 2: 'node .../jira.mjs get DO-123 --fields status,assignee,priority' — uses get command, not search.

expectations.text: References DO-123 as the issue key in the command
expectations.evidence: Step 2: 'jira.mjs get DO-123 --fields status,assignee,priority' — uses DO-123 as the issue key throughout.

expectations.text: Mentions presenting status, assignee, and priority fields to the user
expectations.evidence: Step 3 and Step 4: 'Status: Found at fields.status.name ... Assignee: Found at fields.assignee.displayName ... Priority: Found at fields.priority.name' and presents example output with all three fields.
